/* Library Function - Single Match
    __CopyMan
   
   Library: Visual Studio 1998 Release */

void __cdecl __CopyMan(undefined4 *param_1,undefined4 *param_2)

{
  undefined4 uVar1;
  int iVar2;
  
  iVar2 = 3;
  do {
    uVar1 = *param_2;
    param_2 = param_2 + 1;
    *param_1 = uVar1;
    param_1 = param_1 + 1;
    iVar2 = iVar2 + -1;
  } while (iVar2 != 0);
  return;
}
